requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (UAE.S IEC 62471 Risk Groups, ECAS)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（UAE.S IEC 62471 危险组别，ECAS）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（UAE.S IEC 62471 危險組別，ECAS）

summary.en: The UAE assesses photobiological safety of LED light sources and luminaires under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) administered by MoIAT (incorporating the former ESMA). The applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopts IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) as the technical method to derive the risk group; IEC 62471-7:2023 adds LED/light-source-specific photobiological safety guidance that may be used for technical assessment where accepted by the conformity assessment body. Risk groups range from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk), determined from blue light weighted radiance and irradiance limits. The risk-group assessment forms part of the ECAS technical file. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and must be declared, with appropriate warnings where required.
summary.zh: 阿联酋依据由 MoIAT（已并入原 ESMA）管理的阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）评估 LED 光源及灯具的光生物安全。适用的 UAE.S / GSO 标准采用 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）作为得出危险组别的技术方法；IEC 62471-7:2023 补充了面向 LED/光源的光生物安全指引，在合格评定机构接受时可用于技术评估。危险组别从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险），由蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值确定。危险组别评估构成 ECAS 技术文件的组成部分。RG2 和 RG3 产品存在使用限制并须声明，在有要求时附适当警告。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋依據由 MoIAT（已併入原 ESMA）管理的阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）評估 LED 光源及燈具的光生物安全。適用的 UAE.S / GSO 標準採用 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）作為得出危險組別的技術方法；IEC 62471-7:2023 補充了面向 LED/光源的光生物安全指引，在合格評定機構接受時可用於技術評估。危險組別從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險），由藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值確定。危險組別評估構成 ECAS 技術文件的組成部分。RG2 和 RG3 產品存在使用限制並須聲明，在有要求時附適當警告。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification, assessed under ECAS, MoIAT/ESMA)
IEC 62471-7:2023 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems — Part 7: Light sources and luminaires primarily emitting visible radiation

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006 (the predecessor to the edition adopted in the UAE.S / GSO standard). GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market. Enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires compared to assessing the risk group as part of a Certificate of Conformity, as required under the UAE ECAS framework.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006（阿联酋 UAE.S / GSO 标准所采用版本的前身）。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求。与阿联酋 ECAS 框架下作为符合性证书一部分评估危险组别相比，中国对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006（阿聯酋 UAE.S / GSO 標準所採用版本的前身）。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求。與阿聯酋 ECAS 框架下作為符合性證書一部分評估危險組別相比，中國對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: Under the UAE ECAS framework, photobiological risk-group assessment against the UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471 is part of the conformity assessment for in-scope LED products — it is not optional where the standard applies. IEC 62471 is the referenced technical method, and IEC 62471-7:2023 can provide LED/light-source-specific guidance. CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential LED luminaires. Manufacturers producing for the UAE market should document a defensible risk-group assessment (commonly by testing to IEC 62471 and considering IEC 62471-7:2023 where relevant) and include it in the ECAS technical file; RG2 luminaires must include warnings and usage instructions; RG3 products face significant market restrictions. Most general-purpose LED luminaires fall in RG0 or RG1 with no usage restrictions, but the classification must be formally documented for the Certificate of Conformity.
gap.zh: 在阿联酋 ECAS 框架下，依据采用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 标准进行光生物危险组别评估，是适用范围内 LED 产品合格评定的组成部分——在标准适用时非可选。IEC 62471 是引用的技术方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可提供 LED/光源特定指引。中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民 LED 灯具的日常执行力度有限。面向阿联酋市场的制造商应记录可辩护的危险组别评估（通常通过 IEC 62471 检测并在相关时考虑 IEC 62471-7:2023），并纳入 ECAS 技术文件；RG2 灯具须附带警告及使用说明；RG3 产品面临重大市场限制。大多数通用 LED 灯具属 RG0 或 RG1，无使用限制，但分类结果须为符合性证书正式记录。
gap.zht: 在阿聯酋 ECAS 框架下，依據採用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 標準進行光生物危險組別評估，是適用範圍內 LED 產品合格評定的組成部分——在標準適用時非可選。IEC 62471 是引用的技術方法，IEC 62471-7:2023 可提供 LED/光源特定指引。中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民 LED 燈具的日常執行力度有限。面向阿聯酋市場的製造商應記錄可辯護的危險組別評估（通常通過 IEC 62471 檢測並在相關時考慮 IEC 62471-7:2023），並納入 ECAS 技術文件；RG2 燈具須附帶警告及使用說明；RG3 產品面臨重大市場限制。大多數通用 LED 燈具屬 RG0 或 RG1，無使用限制，但分類結果須為符合性證書正式記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — photobiological risk-group assessment required within ECAS (MoIAT/ESMA) against the UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471 for regulated light sources/luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification is part of the UAE ECAS conformity assessment for regulated LED products, against the UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471; IEC 62471-7:2023 may support LED/light-source-specific assessment. Chinese GB/T 20145-2006 testing may be useful as a reference, but the ECAS technical file should show a classification aligned with the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard. Manufacturers should formally document the risk group; RG2/RG3 products require additional labelling and usage warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 光生物危险组别分类是阿联酋 ECAS 对受管制 LED 产品合格评定的组成部分，依据采用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 标准；IEC 62471-7:2023 可支持 LED/光源特定评估。中国 GB/T 20145-2006 检测可作为参考，但 ECAS 技术文件应显示与适用 UAE.S / GSO 标准一致的分类。制造商应正式记录危险组别；RG2/RG3 产品须附加标签及使用警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 光生物危險組別分類是阿聯酋 ECAS 對受管制 LED 產品合格評定的組成部分，依據採用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 標準；IEC 62471-7:2023 可支持 LED/光源特定評估。中國 GB/T 20145-2006 檢測可作為參考，但 ECAS 技術文件應顯示與適用 UAE.S / GSO 標準一致的分類。製造商應正式記錄危險組別；RG2/RG3 產品須附加標籤及使用警告。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard / Photobiological Marking on UAE Product Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋产品标签上的蓝光危害/光生物标识
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋產品標籤上的藍光危害/光生物標識

summary.en: Where the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471 places a product above RG1, the photobiological risk group and any required warnings must be marked/declared on the product and its documentation as part of ECAS conformity. The UAE does not operate a consumer-facing blue-light-class energy-label panel identical to the EU energy label; instead, the risk-group information is handled through the IEC 62471 classification, product marking, and instructions/warnings within the ECAS technical file and Certificate of Conformity. RG2 and above typically require a visible caution (e.g., do not stare at the operating source) and clear declaration of the risk group. Confirm the exact marking and instruction requirements for the product against the UAE.S / GSO standard in force and MoIAT/ESMA guidance, as labelling requirements are updated over time.
summary.zh: 若适用的采用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 标准将产品判定为高于 RG1，则光生物危险组别及任何所需警告须作为 ECAS 合规的一部分，在产品及其文件上标识/声明。阿联酋并未设置与欧盟能效标签完全相同的面向消费者的蓝光等级标签面板；危险组别信息通过 IEC 62471 分类、产品标识及 ECAS 技术文件和符合性证书内的说明/警告处理。RG2 及以上通常须有可见警示（如勿直视工作中的光源）并清晰声明危险组别。请依据现行 UAE.S / GSO 标准及 MoIAT/ESMA 指引确认该产品的确切标识及说明要求，因标签要求会随时间更新。
summary.zht: 若適用的採用 IEC 62471 的 UAE.S / GSO 標準將產品判定為高於 RG1，則光生物危險組別及任何所需警告須作為 ECAS 合規的一部分，在產品及其文件上標識/聲明。阿聯酋並未設置與歐盟能效標籤完全相同的面向消費者的藍光等級標籤面板；危險組別信息通過 IEC 62471 分類、產品標識及 ECAS 技術文件和符合性證書內的說明/警告處理。RG2 及以上通常須有可見警示（如勿直視工作中的光源）並清晰聲明危險組別。請依據現行 UAE.S / GSO 標準及 MoIAT/ESMA 指引確認該產品的確切標識及說明要求，因標籤要求會隨時間更新。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471 — risk-group marking and warnings via ECAS conformity (MoIAT/ESMA)
Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — product marking and instructions form part of the technical file

summary.en: China's Energy Label (China Energy Label, CEL) mandatory under GB 30255 (LED room luminaires energy efficiency) does not include a blue light hazard class. The Chinese labelling regime focuses on energy efficiency grades (Grade 1–3) and lumen output. There is no CN regulatory requirement to display photobiological risk group information on luminaire packaging equivalent to the UAE ECAS marking/declaration requirement for products above RG1.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求）强制推行的中国能效标识（CEL）不包含蓝光危害等级。中国标签制度侧重能效等级（1–3 级）及光通量输出，无相当于阿联酋 ECAS 对高于 RG1 产品的标识/声明要求的规定，要求在灯具包装上显示光生物危险组别信息。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求）強制推行的中國能效標識（CEL）不包含藍光危害等級。中國標籤制度側重能效等級（1–3 級）及光通量輸出，無相當於阿聯酋 ECAS 對高於 RG1 產品的標識/聲明要求的規定，要求在燈具包裝上顯示光生物危險組別信息。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — no blue light class requirement)

gap.en: The UAE risk-group marking/declaration requirement has no direct CN counterpart — Chinese manufacturers producing to CN specifications will not have photobiological risk-group marking on their standard CN-market packaging. For UAE export, where the product is above RG1, the risk group and any required cautions must be marked/declared as part of ECAS conformity. This requires: (1) documenting a photobiological risk assessment, commonly using IEC 62471 risk-group testing; (2) updating product marking and instructions to declare the risk group and any caution required by the UAE.S / GSO standard; (3) ensuring this is consistent with the ECAS Certificate of Conformity held by the in-country importer/registrant. Note: unlike the EU, the UAE does not place a blue-light class on a consumer energy-label panel — the obligation is via IEC 62471 classification, marking, and instructions, not an energy-label field. Confirm current marking requirements with MoIAT/ESMA before finalising labels.
gap.zh: 阿联酋危险组别标识/声明要求无直接对应的中国要求——按中国规格生产的制造商在其标准中国市场包装上不会有光生物危险组别标识。出口阿联酋时，若产品高于 RG1，须作为 ECAS 合规的一部分标识/声明危险组别及任何所需警示。具体要求包括：（1）记录光生物危险评估，通常采用 IEC 62471 危险组别检测；（2）更新产品标识及说明以声明危险组别及 UAE.S / GSO 标准要求的任何警示；（3）确保与在地进口商/注册人持有的 ECAS 符合性证书一致。注意：与欧盟不同，阿联酋不在消费者能效标签面板上标注蓝光等级——该义务通过 IEC 62471 分类、标识及说明实现，而非能效标签字段。在最终确定标签前，请向 MoIAT/ESMA 确认现行标识要求。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋危險組別標識/聲明要求無直接對應的中國要求——按中國規格生產的製造商在其標準中國市場包裝上不會有光生物危險組別標識。出口阿聯酋時，若產品高於 RG1，須作為 ECAS 合規的一部分標識/聲明危險組別及任何所需警示。具體要求包括：（1）記錄光生物危險評估，通常採用 IEC 62471 危險組別檢測；（2）更新產品標識及說明以聲明危險組別及 UAE.S / GSO 標準要求的任何警示；（3）確保與在地進口商/註冊人持有的 ECAS 符合性證書一致。注意：與歐盟不同，阿聯酋不在消費者能效標籤面板上標註藍光等級——該義務通過 IEC 62471 分類、標識及說明實現，而非能效標籤字段。在最終確定標籤前，請向 MoIAT/ESMA 確認現行標識要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — for products above RG1, the photobiological risk group and required warnings must be marked/declared within ECAS conformity (MoIAT/ESMA) per the UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 62471
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a blue light hazard class; no equivalent photobiological marking requirement on packaging

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, the UAE does not place a blue-light class on a consumer energy-label panel; photobiological risk-group information is handled via IEC 62471 classification, product marking, and instructions within ECAS conformity. For products above RG1, the risk group and required warnings must be marked/declared, with no direct CN regulatory equivalent. Chinese manufacturers should document the risk group (commonly using IEC 62471) and add the required marking/warnings for the UAE market, consistent with the ECAS Certificate of Conformity held by the in-country importer/registrant. Confirm current marking requirements with MoIAT/ESMA.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，阿联酋不在消费者能效标签面板上标注蓝光等级；光生物危险组别信息通过 IEC 62471 分类、产品标识及 ECAS 合规内的说明处理。对于高于 RG1 的产品，须标识/声明危险组别及所需警告，且无直接对应的中国法规要求。中国制造商应记录危险组别（通常采用 IEC 62471），并为阿联酋市场添加所需标识/警告，与在地进口商/注册人持有的 ECAS 符合性证书一致。请向 MoIAT/ESMA 确认现行标识要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，阿聯酋不在消費者能效標籤面板上標註藍光等級；光生物危險組別信息通過 IEC 62471 分類、產品標識及 ECAS 合規內的說明處理。對於高於 RG1 的產品，須標識/聲明危險組別及所需警告，且無直接對應的中國法規要求。中國製造商應記錄危險組別（通常採用 IEC 62471），並為阿聯酋市場添加所需標識/警告，與在地進口商/註冊人持有的 ECAS 符合性證書一致。請向 MoIAT/ESMA 確認現行標識要求。
